languages.text: "В благодарность за умножение знания об археотехе технодуховенство Алтаря-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17 готово провести над {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинными духами{/g} вашего судна бинарные священнодействия третьей ступени. Генетор экстремис Эоганн Фебрус, манипулус, принявший причастие Движущей Силы, отправляется на борт вашего корабля незамедлительно. Омниссия благословит!"

traits.locale_text: "В благодарность за умножение знания об археотехе технодуховенство Алтаря-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17 готово провести над {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинными духами{/g} вашего судна бинарные священнодействия третьей ступени. Генетор экстремис Эоганн Фебрус, манипулус, принявший причастие Движущей Силы, отправляется на борт вашего корабля незамедлительно. Омниссия благословит!"

languages.text: "In gratitude for the expansion of our knowledge of archeotech, the tech-clergy of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is prepared to perform grade-three binharic rites over the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} of your vessel. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, a Manipulus who has received the benediction of the Motive Force, will be sent to embark your ship immediately. Omnissiah's blessings!"
languages.original_text: "В благодарность за умножение знания об археотехе технодуховенство Алтаря-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17 готово провести над {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинными духами{/g} вашего судна бинарные священнодействия третьей ступени. Генетор экстремис Эоганн Фебрус, манипулус, принявший причастие Движущей Силы, отправляется на борт вашего корабля незамедлительно. Омниссия благословит!"

Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, a Manipulus who has received the benediction of the Motive Force, will be sent to embark your ship immediately. Omnissiah's blessings!"

"In gratitude for the expansion of our knowledge of archeotech, the tech-clergy of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is prepared to perform grade-three binharic rites over the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} of your vessel. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, a Manipulus who has received the benediction of the Motive Force, will be sent to embark your ship immediately. Omnissiah's blessings!"

"In gratitude for the expansion of our knowledge of archeotech, the tech-clergy of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is prepared to perform grade-three binharic rites over the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} of your vessel. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, a Manipulus who has received the benediction of the Motive Force, will be sent to embark your ship immediately. Omnissiah's blessings!"

languages.text: 「アルター・テンプル・カリシス・エクスト17のテクノロジー司祭は、アーケオテクノロジーの知識の拡大に感謝し、貴船の機械霊に対して3級のビナリック儀式を行う準備が整っています。そのような聖典を行うユニットが、非常に近い将来に派遣されます。オムニシアの祝福あれ！」
languages.original_text: "In gratitude for the expansion of archeotech knowledge, the tech-clergy of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is prepared to perform grade-three binharic rites over the machine spirits of your vessel. A unit capable of such sacraments will be dispatched in the very near future. Omnissiah's blessings!"

traits.locale_text: 「アルター・テンプル・カリシス・エクスト17のテクノロジー司祭は、アーケオテクノロジーの知識の拡大に感謝し、貴船の機械霊に対して3級のビナリック儀式を行う準備が整っています。そのような聖典を行うユニットが、非常に近い将来に派遣されます。オムニシアの祝福あれ！」

languages.text: «Agradecidos por la expansión de nuestros conocimientos sobre arqueotecnología, los tecnoclérigos de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 están preparados para realizar ritos binarios de grado tres para los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g} de su nave. El genetor extremis Eogunn Februs, un manipulus que ha recibido la bendición de la Fuerza Motriz, subirá a bordo de su nave de inmediato. ¡Que el Omnissiah l{mf|e|a} bendiga!».
languages.original_text: "In gratitude for the expansion of our knowledge of archeotech, the tech-clergy of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is prepared to perform grade-three binharic rites over the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} of your vessel. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, a Manipulus who has received the benediction of the Motive Force, will be sent to embark your ship immediately. Omnissiah's blessings!"

traits.locale_text: «Agradecidos por la expansión de nuestros conocimientos sobre arqueotecnología, los tecnoclérigos de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 están preparados para realizar ritos binarios de grado tres para los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g} de su nave. El genetor extremis Eogunn Februs, un manipulus que ha recibido la bendición de la Fuerza Motriz, subirá a bordo de su nave de inmediato. ¡Que el Omnissiah l{mf|e|a} bendiga!».

languages.text: "Als Dank für die Erweiterung unseres archäotechnischen Wissens ist die Techpriesterschaft von Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 bereit, binhärische Riten des dritten Grades für die {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeister{/g} Eures Schiffes zu feiern. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, ein Manipulus, der die Benediktion der Antriebskraft erfahren hat, wird umgehend auf Euer Schiff entsandt. Der Omnissiah segne Euch!"
languages.original_text: "In gratitude for the expansion of our knowledge of archeotech, the tech-clergy of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is prepared to perform grade-three binharic rites over the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} of your vessel. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, a Manipulus who has received the benediction of the Motive Force, will be sent to embark your ship immediately. Omnissiah's blessings!"

traits.locale_text: "Als Dank für die Erweiterung unseres archäotechnischen Wissens ist die Techpriesterschaft von Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 bereit, binhärische Riten des dritten Grades für die {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeister{/g} Eures Schiffes zu feiern. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, ein Manipulus, der die Benediktion der Antriebskraft erfahren hat, wird umgehend auf Euer Schiff entsandt. Der Omnissiah segne Euch!"

languages.text: « Pour vous remercier d'avoir étendu leurs connaissances archéotechnologiques, les membres du techno-clergé d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 sont disposés à accomplir des rites binhaires de troisième rang à destination des {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g} de votre vaisseau. Le genetor extremis Eogunn Februs, un manipulus ayant reçu la bénédiction de la Force Motrice, sera immédiatement envoyé sur votre vaisseau. Puisse l'Omnimessie vous bénir ! »
languages.original_text: "In gratitude for the expansion of our knowledge of archeotech, the tech-clergy of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is prepared to perform grade-three binharic rites over the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} of your vessel. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, a Manipulus who has received the benediction of the Motive Force, will be sent to embark your ship immediately. Omnissiah's blessings!"

traits.locale_text: « Pour vous remercier d'avoir étendu leurs connaissances archéotechnologiques, les membres du techno-clergé d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 sont disposés à accomplir des rites binhaires de troisième rang à destination des {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g} de votre vaisseau. Le genetor extremis Eogunn Februs, un manipulus ayant reçu la bénédiction de la Force Motrice, sera immédiatement envoyé sur votre vaisseau. Puisse l'Omnimessie vous bénir ! »

languages.text: “为感谢您拓展了我们对远古科技的认知，卡利西斯祭坛17号的技术教士已准备好为您舰船的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}施行三级二进制仪式。特级基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯——一位蒙受源力赐福的操纵者——将即刻登舰报到。愿欧姆尼赛亚赐福！”
languages.original_text: "In gratitude for the expansion of our knowledge of archeotech, the tech-clergy of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is prepared to perform grade-three binharic rites over the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} of your vessel. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, a Manipulus who has received the benediction of the Motive Force, will be sent to embark your ship immediately. Omnissiah's blessings!"

traits.locale_text: “为感谢您拓展了我们对远古科技的认知，卡利西斯祭坛17号的技术教士已准备好为您舰船的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}施行三级二进制仪式。特级基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯——一位蒙受源力赐福的操纵者——将即刻登舰报到。愿欧姆尼赛亚赐福！”

languages.text: "Arkeotek bilgimizin genişletilmesine minnettar olan Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'nin tekno ruhban sınıfı, geminizin {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhları{/g} üzerinde üçüncü derece ikilidil ayinler gerçekleştirmeye hazırdır. Devinim Gücü'nün lütfunu almış bir Manipülus olan Genetör Extremis Eogunn Februs, geminize binmek üzere derhâl gönderilecektir. Hermesih'in lütufları üzerinize olsun!"
languages.original_text: "In gratitude for the expansion of our knowledge of archeotech, the tech-clergy of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is prepared to perform grade-three binharic rites over the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} of your vessel. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, a Manipulus who has received the benediction of the Motive Force, will be sent to embark your ship immediately. Omnissiah's blessings!"
